    Give students the tools to build anything

    Help the next generation create and innovate by joining our global network of university partners.

    Empower student innovation

    Bring next gen AI to your curriculum

    Students today don’t just want to learn about technology, they want to shape it. With Base44, anyone can build real products from day one, no coding required. We’re partnering with universities around the world to put creative power right in students’ hands, so they can learn by building, exploring, and seeing results.

    Upcoming events

    Free, hands-on opportunities for students to build, learn, and connect with creators from across the globe- from hackathons to live webinars.

    Apr 08

    Build What You Imagine: AI-Powered App Building with Base44

    Got an idea for a startup, an app, or website but don’t want to wait months to build it? In this webinar series, the Base44 Education team will show how creators use Base44 to turn ideas into real apps and software. You’ll learn how to plan and write a strong first prompt, build live in the platform, and iterate your way to a functional prototype. You bring the idea. Base44 brings it to life.

    Frequently asked questions

    What types of applications or projects can students build with Base44?

    Base44 is highly versatile and supports a wide range of projects, including personal productivity apps, portfolios, landing pages, and business process automation systems. It’s also ideal for rapid prototyping and building MVPs.

    Is student data secure with Base44?

    Yes. We take data security seriously. Base44 includes built-in user management and authentication, along with industry-standard encryption and security practices to protect both student data and user information. For more details, please refer to our Privacy and Security documentation.

    Do students own the applications or projects they create with Base44?

    Absolutely. Students retain full ownership of all applications and content they create using Base44. We claim no rights to your work. You are free to modify, distribute, or commercialize your projects however you choose. For additional details, please review our Terms of Service.

    Do students need coding experience to use Base44?

    No coding experience is required. Base44 is designed to be accessible to non-technical users. Simply describe what you want to build in plain language, and our AI handles the technical implementation.

    Who should I contact if a student is having trouble with their account?

    For project-related questions, please reach out to our education team directly. For account access or subscription issues, contact the Base44 customer support team.

    Does Base44 offer private classroom instruction?

    Yes. We love being part of the classroom and we review requests for classroom visits and private instruction on a case-by-case basis. We also regularly host live webinars that students can attend individually, or that educators can embed into their classroom instruction.

    What additional benefits do educators get when partnering with Base44 education team?

    Educators who partner with us get teaching materials, guest lectures, webinars, and a dedicated partner to help plan your courses.

    Can I use Base44 in my classroom with my own curriculum materials?

    Yes. Base44 is an open and flexible platform. Educators are encouraged to integrate it into their classrooms in whatever way best supports their curriculum and teaching style.

    How many projects can students build on the free plan?

    Base44 uses a credit-based system, where each prompt consumes account credits. The free tier includes 5 credits per day and 25 credits per month. Once the monthly limit is reached, additional credits aren’t available until the next billing cycle or a paid plan is purchased. Paid plans also unlock advanced features and higher credit limits.

    Do you offer student or educator discounts on paid plans?

    Yes. Students and educators may be eligible for 50% off select plans. To access the discount, a valid educational email address is required. You can view and purchase discounted plans at app.base44.com/billing.

    How do students share finished apps with classmates, instructors, or in their portfolio?

    Base44 includes built-in hosting, so once a project is published, it’s instantly live and shareable via a link. Students can choose to make their apps public or restrict access to invite-only.

    How does Base44 compare to its competitors in the vibe coding market?

    Base44 is the only true all-in-one vibe coding platform. It allows students to build, launch, and manage full-stack applications including front-end design, back-end storage, security, and authentication seamlessly within a single integrated account, eliminating the need for third-party tools.

    So, what are we building?

    Start Building

    Base44 is the AI-powered platform that lets users build fully functioning apps in minutes. Using nothing but natural language, Base44 enables anyone to turn their words into productivity apps, back-office tools, customer portals, or complete enterprise products that are ready to use—no integrations required.
